alternative_parents.description: Tertiary alkylarylamines having two aryl and one alkyl groups attached to the amino group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyldiarylamines

alternative_parents.description: Organic Compounds containing a benzene ring which bears at least one carboxyl group.

alternative_parents.name: Benzenesulfonyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an acyl moiety of benzoic acid with the formula (C6H5CO-).

alternative_parents.description: Phenols that are substituted with an amine group at the 2-position of the benzene ring.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an aminobenzene moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Aniline and substituted anilines

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a 1,3,5-triazine ring which is 2,4-disusbtituted wit amine groups.
alternative_parents.name: 1,3,5-triazine-2,4-diamines

alternative_parents.name: Chloro-s-triazines

alternative_parents.description: N-aliphatic amine derivatives of 1,3,5-triazines. 1,3,5-triazines are aromatic compounds having three nitrogen ring atoms at the 1-, 3-, and 5- positions.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the acyl chloride functional group.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a sulfate group that carries an alkyl group through an ether group.
alternative_parents.name: Alkyl sulfates

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a sulfonyl group( which as the general structure RS(=O)2R' (R,R' =alkyl, aryl)) attached to two carbon atoms.

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing the sulfonic acid group, which has the general structure RS(=O)2OH (R is not a hydrogen atom).

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a transition metal atom in its ionic form.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with a positive electric charge.

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
class.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as 4-sulfobenzoic acids. These are sulfobenzoic acid carrying the sulfonyl group at the 4-position of the benzene group.

direct_parent.description: Sulfobenzoic acid carrying the sulfonyl group at the 4-position of the benzene group.
direct_parent.name: 4-sulfobenzoic acids

intermediate_nodes.description: Benzoic acids carrying a sulfonyl group on the benzene ring.
intermediate_nodes.name: Sulfobenzoic acids

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a sulfonic acid or a derivative thereof that is linked to a benzene ring.
subclass.name: Benzenesulfonic acids and derivatives

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
